title: azure-kv: credential chain silently falls back to dev creds on prod
description: secretx-azure-kv/src/lib.rs builds a ChainedCredential: ManagedIdentityCredential first, then DeveloperToolsCredential. On an Azure-hosted workload where managed identity exists but transiently fails at token-fetch time, the chain falls through to DeveloperToolsCredential. If a developer's cached ~/.azure credentials are present (e.g. mounted ConfigMap or shared volume), the workload silently authenticates with developer identity instead of the managed identity. Trigger: transient MI failure on Azure VM/AKS + developer credentials accessible → workload uses wrong identity with no log warning.
